_comment: Per-product fulfillment map for scripts/stripe-poll.py (2026-07-13). Keyed by Stripe product ID. A checkout for a product NOT listed here is loudly logged and skipped — never silently dropped, never fulfilled with the wrong product's welcome email. Keep in sync with RICK_PRODUCT_IDS + PORTFOLIO_PRODUCT_IDS in runtime/revenue_signals.py (RICK_REAL_PRODUCT_IDS is now their union, ops-watch scope only — LinguaLive here is portfolio fulfillment for Khrystyna, NOT Rick MRR).
